title: The Book Of Urizen: Preludium
content:
Of the primeval Priests assum'd power,
    When Eternals spurn'd back his religion;
    And gave him a place in the north,
    Obscure, shadowy, void, solitary.

    Eternals I hear your call gladly,
    Dictate swift winged words, & fear not
    To unfold your dark visions of torment.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Blake delivers a powerful performance in "The Book Of Urizen: Preludium"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
